character.name: A 32px low top-down pixel art fantasy MMORPG warrior character. Small armored swordsman with steel helmet, grey metal armor, brown leather belt and boots, short sword in right hand, small round shield on left arm. Clean dark outline, readable silhouette, chibi RPG proportions, consistent Tiny Swords style, no background, no text, no labels, centered character, transparent background if possible.
